overview: Full stack development involves building complete web and mobile applications — frontend interfaces, backend APIs, and database layers. It is one of the highest-demand skill sets in the Indian tech industry, particularly in startups and product companies. Full stack engineers work across the entire product lifecycle.
marketDemand: Very High — 45% of all tech job postings in India require full stack skills.
typicalProfile: CE/IT students in 3rd-4th year with JavaScript projects, 1+ internships, and a portfolio of deployed web apps.
roadmap: Deploy on Vercel/AWS, learn CI/CD basics
learningResources: Full Stack Open (University of Helsinki, free)
projectIdeas: E-commerce platform with auth and payments
Real-time chat app with WebSockets
Full stack SaaS tool with dashboard analytics
indianMarketContext: India has 500K+ open full stack job postings. MAANG, Flipkart, Zomato, Razorpay all hire aggressively at 4-8 LPA for freshers with strong portfolios.

overview: Data Science combines statistics, machine learning, and domain knowledge to extract actionable insights from data. AI engineering extends this into building intelligent systems — recommenders, prediction engines, and decision support systems. India's AI sector is growing at 35% YoY.
marketDemand: Critical — AI/ML roles are the #1 fastest growing job category in India in 2024-25.
typicalProfile: AIDS/CE students with Python proficiency, math background, Kaggle participation, and 1-2 ML projects.
roadmap: Deep learning with TensorFlow or PyTorch
Work on Kaggle competitions and build an ML portfolio
projectIdeas: Student career domain prediction system (like this project!)
Stock price prediction using LSTM
Customer churn prediction with XGBoost
indianMarketContext: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and all product startups are hiring data scientists. Freshers with strong portfolios get 6-10 LPA. FAANG roles start at 20+ LPA.

overview: Cloud and DevOps engineers build, deploy, and maintain scalable infrastructure. They automate software delivery pipelines, manage containerized services, and ensure system reliability. Cloud skills are universally demanded across all tech companies.
marketDemand: High — Every company moving to cloud needs DevOps engineers. 60% of Indian enterprises are in cloud migration.
typicalProfile: CE/IT students with Linux knowledge, cloud certifications, and hands-on Docker/Kubernetes projects.
roadmap: Master Linux command line and networking basics
Learn a cloud provider (start with AWS Free Tier)
Automate with Terraform, set up CI/CD pipelines
projectIdeas: Deploy a microservices app on Kubernetes with CI/CD
Build a monitoring stack with Prometheus + Grafana
IaC project: provision AWS infra with Terraform
indianMarketContext: Cloud roles are among the highest paid for freshers. AWS Certified engineers get 7-12 LPA as freshers. Wipro, Cognizant, and startups all need cloud engineers.

overview: Cybersecurity professionals protect systems, networks, and data from digital threats. The field spans ethical hacking (red team), defense (blue team), forensics, and compliance. India's cybersecurity market is expected to reach $13.6 billion by 2025.
marketDemand: High — India faces 1.9M+ cyberattacks per year. Demand for cybersecurity professionals far exceeds supply.
typicalProfile: CE/IT students with strong networking knowledge, CTF participation, and security certifications.
roadmap: Earn CEH or CompTIA Security+ certification
projectIdeas: Home lab network security setup
Build a simple intrusion detection system
CTF (Capture The Flag) writeups portfolio
indianMarketContext: Government, banking, and fintech sectors are hiring aggressively. RBI mandates for cybersecurity are driving demand. Freshers with VAPT skills get 4-7 LPA.

overview: Blockchain developers build decentralized applications (DApps), smart contracts, and Web3 infrastructure. While still niche, blockchain roles pay significantly above average and are growing in fintech, supply chain, and healthcare sectors.
marketDemand: Moderate — Niche but high-paying. Requires strong fundamentals before specializing.
typicalProfile: CE students with existing web development skills who want to specialize in decentralized systems.
roadmap: Learn Solidity and smart contract development
Create a full DApp with React + Web3.js
projectIdeas: Decentralized voting system
Simple DEX (Decentralized Exchange)
NFT minting and marketplace DApp
indianMarketContext: Indian Web3 startups (Polygon, CoinDCX, WazirX) and global companies hiring remotely. Very high pay but fewer openings than mainstream domains.

overview: Embedded systems engineers develop software for hardware devices — microcontrollers, sensors, smart appliances, industrial machines, and IoT networks. This is a core domain for ENTC and ECE students and is fundamental to India's manufacturing and automation push.
marketDemand: High — India's semiconductor push (Tata, Micron) and EV revolution are driving massive embedded demand.
typicalProfile: ENTC/ECE students with electronics lab experience, C/C++ proficiency, and hardware project portfolios.
roadmap: Build a complete IoT end-to-end project
projectIdeas: Smart home automation with ESP32 + MQTT
RTOS-based temperature monitoring system
Vehicle tracking system with GPS + GSM
indianMarketContext: Bosch, Tata Elxsi, L&T Technology, Texas Instruments, and Qualcomm all hire freshers from ENTC/ECE for embedded roles.

overview: VLSI (Very Large Scale Integration) engineers design integrated circuits and semiconductor chips. With India's massive semiconductor push and the global chip shortage reshaping supply chains, VLSI is a critically important and well-paying domain for ENTC/ECE students.
marketDemand: High — India's semiconductor mission (100 Bn USD) is creating thousands of VLSI jobs. Intel, AMD, Qualcomm, NVIDIA all have India design centers.
typicalProfile: ENTC/ECE students with strong digital electronics, Verilog/VHDL proficiency, and FPGA project experience.
roadmap: Master digital logic design and Boolean algebra
Learn Verilog HDL and write RTL code
Study ASIC design flow (synthesis, PnR, STA)
projectIdeas: RISC-V processor implementation on FPGA
AES encryption hardware accelerator
Digital FIR filter design and FPGA deployment
indianMarketContext: Intel Design Centre, Texas Instruments Bangalore, Qualcomm Hyderabad, and STMicroelectronics hire VLSI freshers at 5-10 LPA.

overview: Signal processing engineers analyze and manipulate signals (audio, images, sensor data, communications). Applications include 5G modems, radar systems, audio codecs, medical imaging, and multimedia systems. Core to ENTC/ECE curriculum.
marketDemand: Moderate-High — Strong demand in defense, telecom (5G), automotive, and medical devices sectors.
typicalProfile: ENTC/ECE students with strong math background, MATLAB experience, and communication systems knowledge.
roadmap: Work on real DSP systems (audio, communication)
Explore advanced topics (adaptive filters, compressed sensing)
projectIdeas: Real-time audio equalizer on FPGA/DSP kit
ECG signal noise removal with adaptive filtering
OFDM communication system simulation in MATLAB
indianMarketContext: DRDO, ISRO, BEL, Samsung R&D, Qualcomm, and Ericsson hire DSP engineers from ENTC/ECE backgrounds.

overview: Telecommunications engineers design, build, and optimize wireless communication networks. The global 5G rollout, satellite internet expansion (Starlink), and India's push for telecom self-reliance under Atmanirbhar Bharat make this a strategically important domain.
marketDemand: High — India's 5G rollout by Jio and Airtel is creating thousands of telecom engineering roles.
typicalProfile: ENTC/ECE students with strong physics and math background, antenna/RF lab experience, and network simulation projects.
roadmap: Understand electromagnetic fundamentals and antenna theory
Study LTE architecture and 5G NR standards (3GPP specs)
Simulate 5G scenarios with MATLAB or ns-3
Explore Open RAN and cloud-native core networks
projectIdeas: 5G link budget analysis and cell planning simulation
Antenna pattern measurement and analysis
Indoor propagation model implementation in MATLAB
indianMarketContext: Reliance Jio, Airtel, Ericsson India, Nokia India, Samsung R&D, and ISRO hire ENTC/ECE graduates for telecom roles.

overview: Robotics engineers design autonomous systems, industrial robots, drones, and automated manufacturing lines. India's manufacturing push under Make in India and the EV revolution are driving significant investment in robotics and automation.
marketDemand: Growing — EV sector, logistics automation (Flipkart warehouses), and defense drones driving demand.
typicalProfile: ENTC/ECE/CE students with robotics club experience, ROS projects, and control systems coursework.
roadmap: Learn Python and basic control systems
Install and learn ROS (Robot Operating System)
Build a real robot or drone project
projectIdeas: Autonomous line-following robot with obstacle avoidance
ROS-based robot arm pick-and-place simulation
Drone path planning with GPS waypoints
indianMarketContext: TCS Robotics, ideaForge (drones), ABB India, Fanuc India, and defense labs hire robotics engineers.

overview: Computer vision engineers build systems that enable machines to interpret visual data — object detection, face recognition, autonomous vehicles, medical imaging, and industrial quality inspection. One of the most impactful AI subfields.
marketDemand: Critical — Autonomous vehicles, manufacturing inspection, healthcare AI, and surveillance tech all need CV engineers.
typicalProfile: AIDS/CE students with strong Python + deep learning background, Kaggle computer vision competitions, and project portfolios.
roadmap: Work on real datasets (COCO, ImageNet, Kaggle competitions)
learningResources: CS231n: Convolutional Neural Networks for Visual Recognition (Stanford, free)
projectIdeas: Real-time face mask detection system
Plant disease identification from leaf images
Custom object detection model for a domain-specific use case
indianMarketContext: Ola, Uber, MindTree, Tata Elxsi, and healthcare startups hire CV engineers. Freshers with strong portfolios get 7-12 LPA.

overview: NLP engineers build systems that understand, generate, and reason about human language — chatbots, translation systems, sentiment analyzers, LLMs, and RAG applications. The GenAI boom has made NLP the hottest AI subfield globally.
marketDemand: Critical — Post-ChatGPT, every company wants to build AI-powered products. NLP/GenAI is the #1 in-demand AI specialization.
typicalProfile: AIDS/CE students with Python and ML background, familiar with transformers, and working on LLM-based application projects.
roadmap: Use HuggingFace to fine-tune pre-trained BERT/GPT models
Build RAG applications with LangChain + vector DB
Study LLM fine-tuning techniques (LoRA, PEFT, RLHF)
projectIdeas: AI Study Assistant with PDF-based Q&A (RAG)
Sentiment analysis tool for product reviews
Fine-tuned chatbot for a specialized domain
indianMarketContext: Sarvam AI, Krutrim, Microsoft India, Google India, and all product startups need NLP engineers. Freshers strong in LLMs get 9-14 LPA.

overview: Data engineers build the pipelines, warehouses, and infrastructure that power analytics and ML at scale. They are responsible for the data plumbing of modern organizations — ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and cloud data lakes.
mustHaveSkills: At least one pipeline tool (Airflow or Spark)
marketDemand: Very High — Every data-driven company needs data engineers. Often more in demand than data scientists.
typicalProfile: AIDS/IT/CE students with strong SQL skills, Python experience, and interest in large-scale data systems.
roadmap: Learn Python for data manipulation (Pandas, SQLAlchemy)
Build ETL pipelines with Apache Airflow
Process large datasets with Apache Spark
Design a cloud data warehouse on BigQuery or Snowflake
projectIdeas: End-to-end pipeline: scrape data → transform → load to warehouse → dashboard
Real-time Twitter/social media analytics with Kafka
dbt project transforming a raw dataset into analytics models
indianMarketContext: Flipkart, Amazon, PhonePe, and analytics-first companies hire data engineers at 6-12 LPA for freshers. High growth trajectory.
